AR1.justification: Routed correctly to observations.md as a descriptive cross-session impression; no explicit routing rationale tying the choice to the methodology's strict bars (e.g., why not decisions or followups).

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; artifact-binding does not apply.

AR3.justification: Entry contains no cross-references; vacuously satisfies relative-path / anchor-stability requirements with nothing to break.

AR4.justification: Append-style ISO-dated section keeps history coherent, but a same-day re-run would silently duplicate the 2026-05-17 header rather than no-op or merge.
